reviews.author: Anurag Nagar
reviews.review_body: I am student of Holy Public School. The school's commitment to academic excellence, caring faculty, and vibrant extracurricular activities have created an exceptional learning environment. I've witnessed tremendous personal growth and development during my time here, and I'm truly grateful for the valuable skills and knowledge I've gained. Holy Public School is undoubtedly a place where students thrive and succeed.

reviews.school_name: Holy Public School - Block A,Sigma I
reviews.author: Mamta Chauhan
reviews.review_body: I am impressed with the teaching method and class teacher doing Good efforts . I am very grateful to all teachers, coordinator and Principal. they are helpful and understandable. Overall school help us to grow and learn not only academics-wise but also to become morally ethical. My child is being groomed very well. I feel that my decision was right in sending my child to holy public School. Keep it up!

reviews.school_name: Holy Public School - Block A,Sigma I
reviews.author: Sushma Sharma
reviews.review_body: Great school!! I am very happy to be at this school. Teachers are very nice and helpful. Holy public school brings out the best in every child by tapping into their individual strength, while creating an environment of kindness, responsibility, and leadership. Teachers are passionate about seeing their students succeed.

reviews.school_name: Holy Public School - Block A,Sigma I
reviews.author: Dr. Nidhi Shukla Mishra
reviews.review_body: The most disciplined and well managed school. I love the fun activities, healthy competitions , memorable events, humble and kindest teachers and everything about its good conduct. It provides the students with innumerable opportunities to showcase their talent in many fields and enhance their potential to it's peak. Teachers are very supportive and friendly which makes studying at HPS even more interesting and exciting.

reviews.school_name: Holy Public School - Block A,Sigma I
reviews.author: AbhiDevil
reviews.review_body:
I attended this school nearly a decade ago and have only great things to say about my experience. The teachers are amazing, the curriculum is second to none and each child is treated with personal attention.

My son has attended (Holy public school) for three years now. She absolutely loves the school and the staff. HeMy daughter has attended (SN) for three years now. She absolutely loves the school and the staff. His teachers are a great encouragement and and the academic program is great.
